scripts.check: node --check public/app.js && node --check public/personas.js && node --check public/skills.js && node --check public/projects.js && node --check public/shared/api-client.js && node --check public/shared/model-options.js && node --check public/shared/avatar.js && node --check public/shared/toast.js && node --check public/chat/conversation-list.js && node --check public/chat/participant-pane.js && node --check public/chat/message-timeline.js && node --check public/chat/conversation-settings.js && node --check public/chat/undercover-panel.js && node --check public/chat/werewolf-panel.js && node --check public/chat/mention-menu.js && node --check public/chat/conversation-pane.js
